top_stories.title: Warsh pledges Fed policy 'regime change' to rid inflation 'tax' on American people
top_stories.insight: This indicates a significant shift in the Fed's approach to inflation, which could impact interest rates and the overall economy.

top_stories.title: Goldman Sachs wins $70 billion in asset management deals with Verizon, Lockheed Martin
top_stories.insight: This deal highlights Goldman Sachs' strength in asset management and its ability to secure large contracts with major corporations.

top_stories.title: A July rate hike from the Fed? The odds are rising
top_stories.insight: A potential rate hike in July could have significant implications for the economy, including increased borrowing costs and reduced consumer spending.

top_stories.title: Chipmaker CXMT seeks $10bn in largest China IPO since 2010
top_stories.insight: This IPO could be a significant indicator of the health of the Chinese economy and the demand for technology stocks.

top_stories.title: China’s economy grows at one of lowest rates in decades
top_stories.insight: This slow growth rate could have significant implications for the global economy, including reduced demand for commodities and decreased trade.

daily_summary: The Fed's potential policy shift and a possible rate hike in July are dominating the headlines, while Goldman Sachs' large asset management deals and China's slow economic growth are also making waves.
